<!--
WHAT:  Pull request template — auto-filled by GitHub for every PR.
WHY:   Keeps PRs consistent and reviewable; /create-commit fills this
       structure when opening PRs.
-->

## What & why

<!-- 2-4 plain-English sentences: what changed and why. -->

## Domain rules touched

<!-- Which docs/DOMAIN.md or SECURITY_AND_TRUST.md rules does this
     implement or affect? Write "None" if none. -->

## Testing

- [ ] Lint, typecheck, and tests pass locally
- [ ] Tier 1 tests added/updated if this touches `// MONEY:` or `// SAFETY:` code
- [ ] Manually verified on device/simulator (state which)

## Screenshots

<!-- Required if UI changed; delete section otherwise. -->

## Docs

- [ ] Feature README updated (or N/A)
- [ ] DOMAIN.md / other docs updated if a rule changed (or N/A)
- [ ] ADR added for any big decision (or N/A)
- [ ] BUILD_PLAN.md checkbox ticked if this completes an item (or N/A)
